title: News from the golf greens
description: GOLF NEWS - Golfers recently came together...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GOLF NEWS - Golfers recently came together to enjoy the warmer weather and the weekly social event that accompanies a long day on the course.","html":"GOLF NEWS - Golfers recently came together to enjoy the warmer weather and the weekly social event that accompanies a long day on the course."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The following competitions were played, and the winners are:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"IPS Competition - 15 May","html":"IPS Competition - 15 May"},{"type":"list","items":["First prize - Jacques Wagener - 42","Second prize - Bets Henning - 37","Third prize - PJ Krige - 36","Two clubs - Jacques Wagener"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sundowner Competition - 17 May","html":"Sundowner Competition - 17 May"},{"type":"list","items":["First prize - Peter Moseley - 21","Second prize - PJ Krige - 18","Third prize - Robert Hobson - 15"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bonus Bogey Competition - 18 May","html":"Bonus Bogey Competition - 18 May"},{"type":"list","items":["First prize - Eddie Nel and JL du Plessis - 44","Second prize - Derek Light and Johnny Ludick - 43","Third prize - Godwin Bosch and Vlam Pretorius - 43","Two clubs - JL du Plessis, Colin Warner, Noel T-Freeme, Juandré Ludick and Dennis Hendriks"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Derek Light and Johnny Ludick","html":"Derek Light and Johnny Ludick"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
